title: GitHub PRs
command: pane_path=$(tmux display-message -p '#{pane_current_path}'); repo_root=$(git -C "$pane_path" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || { printf '[{"icon":"","title":"Not a Git repository","description":"Open tmux-palette from a Git worktree","action":{"shell":":"}}]\n'; exit 0; }; cd "$repo_root" && gh pr list --limit 50 --json number,title,state,isDraft,author --jq '[.[] | {icon: "", title: ("#" + (.number|tostring) + " " + .title), description: ((if .isDraft then "draft" else .state end) + " by " + (.author.login // "unknown")), action: {shell: ("gh pr view " + (.number|tostring) + " --web")}}]'
